PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { Write-Output "Node: $\($node.Source\) \($\(node --version\)\)" } else { Write-Output "Node: NOT INSTALLED" }; $npm = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($npm\) { Write-Output "npm: $\(npm --version\)" } else { Write-Output "npm: NOT INSTALLED" }; $corepack = Get-Command corepack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($corepack\) { Write-Output "corepack: available" } else { Write-Output "corepack: NOT INSTALLED" })
